entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A small-cereal crop also known as Pennisetum glaucum (L.) R. Br. and commonly called Millet

entities.name: NIGERIA
entities.description: Country where pearl millet is grown and categorized by local Hausa names

entities.name: GERO
entities.description: An early maturing type of pearl millet identified in the Hausa language

entities.name: MAIWA
entities.description: A late maturing and photosensitive type of pearl millet identified in the Hausa language

entities.name: DAURO
entities.description: A transplantable and photo-sensitive type of pearl millet identified in the Hausa language

entities.name: EARLY MATURING
entities.description: A growth characteristic associated with the Gero type of pearl millet

entities.name: LATE MATURING
entities.description: A growth characteristic associated with the Maiwa type of pearl millet

entities.name: PHOTOSENSITIVE
entities.description: A characteristic of responding to light, associated with Maiwa and Dauro types of pearl millet

entities.name: TRANSPLANTABLE
entities.description: A characteristic of being able to be transplanted, associated with the Dauro type of pearl millet

entities.name: SAHEL REGION
entities.description: A region in West and Central Africa where millet-based dishes are common

entities.name: WEST AND CENTRAL AFRICA
entities.description: Broad geographical area where pearl millet is cultivated and contributes to food security

entities.name: DOMESTIC LIVESTOCK
entities.description: Animals that utilize pearl millet fodder and grain pericarp as feed

entities.name: POULTRY
entities.description: Birds that utilize pearl millet fodder and grain pericarp as feed

entities.name: DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: Environmental water scarcity to which pearl millet is resilient

entities.name: SOIL SALINITY/ACIDITY
entities.description: Soil chemical conditions to which pearl millet is resilient

entities.name: HIGH TEMPERATURES
entities.description: Environmental heat stress to which pearl millet is resilient

entities.name: FOOD AND NUTRITION SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to sufficient affordable, nutritious food, supported by pearl millet in drier regions of WCA
